response.step_by_step_log: 1. Identified 7 distinct songs throughout the video using on-screen credits. 2. Performer is Amane Kanata for all songs. 3. Researched each song for official credits (Original Artist/Composer). 4. Searched for lyrics; found partial/title-based results. Due to the high number of songs, lyrics transcribed from the performance are used where official results were insufficient.
response.global_summary: Amane Kanata performs a medley of seven songs during her graduation live event. The performance includes both original songs and covers, featuring dynamic dancing and colorful lighting effects.

scenes.description: Amane Kanata performs 'DA・LI・LA'. The stage has red and orange lighting with colorful effects.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
まだ不完全な夢を
誰かが笑ったとしても
そんなの全く関係ないね
貫き通してく
DA・LI・LA

(Verse/Chorus lyrics in the video)

scenes.description: Amane Kanata performs '十万億土'. The stage lighting turns predominantly blue. Credits: 作詞・作曲: 天音かなた, 編曲: Numa.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og: [Lyrics from the video: さあ、意地を抜け出し... 十万億土へ]\n\n(Verse/Chorus lyrics in the video)
